data.name: Citor3 Santa's Elf VR Adult XXX Game
data.detailed_description:
Santa has a naughty side to him as well? Don't believe us? Come see what Citor3 has in store with our first release of a Steam adult VR xxx game! It supports any type of tethered VR headset, so you're good to go immediately.

The game features:
* a VR POV experience
* motion controls interaction with the model
* luscious 3d modeling and textures
* body physics
* soundtrack

data.short_description: An adult vr sex game by Citor3. The virtual simulation gives you access to interact with the busty model via the VR controllers.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or Oculus PC
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel i7
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
